metadata.title: Summits and Conferences in Current Affairs MCQs

questions.question: Where was 12th Asian and Pacific Regional Conference 2026 held?
questions.explanation: The 12th Asian and Pacific Regional Conference was organised by the All India Prosecutors’ Association in New Delhi. The government is promoting innovation in the judicial sector through technology and institutional reforms. Efforts aim to make the justice system more transparent, accessible, and effective. Continuous measures are being taken to ensure swift and equitable delivery of justice to all citizens.

questions.question: Where was Global Conference on Women in Agri-Food Systems 2026 held?
questions.explanation: Droupadi Murmu inaugurated the Global Conference on Women in Agri-Food Systems 2026 in New Delhi. The three-day event was held at the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) Convention Centre with the theme ‘Driving Progress, Attaining New Heights’. The event coincided with the UN-declared International Year for Women Farmers 2026. It focused on gender-responsive policymaking, technological innovation, and inclusive agricultural development.

questions.question: Where was National Conference on Cold Water Fisheries 2026 held?
questions.explanation: The National Conference on Cold Water Fisheries was held on 14 March 2026 at Sher-e-Kashmir International Conference Centre, Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, organised by the Department of Fisheries India. It is the first national dialogue focused on sustainable development of Cold-Water fisheries in India’s high-altitude regions. Cold-water fisheries are found mainly in Himalayas, parts of the Northeast, and peninsular highlands, covering about 5.33 lakh sq. km across states such as Jammu & Kashmir, Ladakh, Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Sikkim, and Arunachal Pradesh.

questions.question: Where was National District Mineral Foundation (DMF) Summit 2026 held?
questions.explanation: Union Minister of Coal & Mines inaugurated the two-day National District Mineral Foundation (DMF) Summit 2026 at SCOPE Convention Centre, New Delhi. The summit focuses on effective use of DMF (District Mineral Foundation) funds for development in mining-affected areas. The theme of summit is Utilisation of DMF funds for Aspirational District Programme (ADP – Aspirational District Programme) and Aspirational Block Programme (ABP – Aspirational Block Programme).

questions.question: Which city is the host of World Buddhist Peace Conference 2026?
questions.explanation: Hyderabad hosted the inaugural World Buddhist Peace Conference 2026, bringing together ministers, monks, scholars, and delegates from over 20 countries. It aims to advance dialogue on peace, reconciliation, and ethical leadership. The event is part of a global initiative to position Telangana as a centre for Buddhist heritage diplomacy and peace-building. The summit focused on Buddhist approaches to conflict resolution, reconciliation, and healing.

questions.question: Where was the first edition of Indian Navy’s biannual Commanders’ Conference 2026 held?
questions.explanation: Indian Navy’s Commanders’ Conference 2026 has commenced at Nausena Bhawan, New Delhi, from 14–16 April 2026. It is the first biannual apex-level conference of 2026, aimed at reviewing the Navy’s operational readiness, capability development, and strategic alignment with national security goals. The conference gains significance amid ongoing West Asia conflict and increased presence of Multi-National Forces (MNFs) in the Indian Ocean Region, impacting India’s energy security. It also reviews operational doctrine, inter-services coordination, and technology-driven responses after Operation Sindoor.

questions.question: Where was National Deliberative Summit on “Harmonizing Administrative Data for Governance” held?
questions.explanation: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation hosted a National Deliberative Summit on “Harmonizing Administrative Data for Governance” in Bhubaneswar. The summit follows the Fifth National Conference of Chief Secretaries (2025). It aims to improve evidence-based policymaking and service delivery using administrative data. States and Union Territories assessed readiness through consultations.

questions.question: Where was 10th National Summit on Innovation and Inclusivity held?
questions.explanation: The Ministry of Health and Family Welfare organised the 10th National Summit on Innovation and Inclusivity – Best Practices Shaping India’s Health Future in Chandigarh from April 30 to May 1, 2026. It is a flagship initiative to showcase innovative and impactful public health practices by States and Union Territories. The summit promotes cross-learning and replication of successful healthcare models.

questions.question: Where was National Security Summit 2.0 held?
questions.explanation: The National Security Summit 2.0 held in New Delhi aimed to discuss evolving national security challenges and strategies in the changing global order. The summit focused on strengthening India’s security preparedness, governance adaptation, and strategic response mechanisms. It highlighted that Operation Sindoor reflects India’s firm commitment to a zero-tolerance policy toward terrorism. It emphasised that India will make no distinction between terrorists and their sponsors in its security approach. The summit stressed the importance of adapting to the New World Order, especially in the context of global conflicts like West Asia.

questions.question: Where was 10th National Summit on Good and Replicable Practices and Innovations in Public Health Systems held?
questions.explanation: The 10th National Summit on Good and Replicable Practices and Innovations in Public Health Systems was held in Chandigarh as a two-day event. The summit aimed to share best practices, innovations, and successful strategies to strengthen India’s public health system. It focused on building a robust and comprehensive healthcare ecosystem under the National Health Mission. The initiative is expected to benefit health workers, frontline staff, and beneficiaries like pregnant women and children through improved record management. The summit highlighted how state-level innovations can be scaled up at the national level for better healthcare delivery.
